properties.description: High-severity DLP alerts from Microsoft Purview surfaced via Defender XDR.
properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProductName has 'Microsoft Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Microsoft 365 DLP'
| where AlertSeverity in ('High','Medium')
| extend AccountUpn = tostring(parse_json(tostring(column_ifexists('Entities',''))) [0].Name)
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity, AccountUpn, Description, Entities
